2606.13558.title: Edit the Bits, Diff the Codes: Bitwise Residual Editing for Visual Autoregressive Models
2606.13558.paper_summary: Text-guided image editing with visual autoregressive (VAR) generators requires controlling both what the model samples and where the sampled change is written back into the image code. Existing VAR editors mainly operate on token streams, features, or flat next-token logits, leaving two native structures of bitwise-residual VAR models underused: the per-bit Bernoulli prediction head and the additive multi-scale residual code field from which the image is assembled. We propose BitResEdit, a training-free editor for bitwise-residual VAR generators such as Infinity. BitEdit performs source-negative guidance by tilting the post-CFG per-bit log-odds along a source--target contrast computed on a shared edited prefix, then projects each update into a closed-form Bernoulli-KL trust region around the clean CFG sampler. ResEdit converts the sampled bits into per-scale continuous-code residuals, gates them with a localization mask, and re-injects them through the generator's native sum-of-scales. Together they couple decision-time bit guidance with combination-time code composition, so masked-out latent features are preserved exactly by code arithmetic while localized, scale-aware edits are applied inside the target region. On PIE-Bench with Infinity-2B, BitResEdit attains the strongest text alignment among same-backbone VAR editors, improving CLIP on the edited region by +1.07 over the strongest prior editor while keeping background preservation competitive with it. Ablations show BitEdit and ResEdit play complementary roles in target alignment and background preservation.
2606.13558.paper_summary_zh: 文本引導的圖像編輯與視覺自回歸（VAR）生成器需要控制模型的取樣內容及取樣變更寫回圖像代碼的位置。現有的VAR編輯器主要在標記流、特徵或平坦的下一標記logits上運作，導致兩種位元殘差VAR模型的原生結構未被充分利用：逐位元的伯努利預測頭和組裝圖像的加性多尺度殘差代碼場。我們提出了BitResEdit，一種針對位元殘差VAR生成器（如Infinity）的無需訓練的編輯器。BitEdit通過沿著在共享編輯前綴上計算的源-目標對比傾斜後CFG逐位元的對數賠率來執行源負引導，然後將每次更新投影到圍繞乾淨CFG取樣器的封閉形式伯努利-KL信任區域。ResEdit將取樣的位元轉換為逐尺度的連續代碼殘差，並用定位掩碼對其進行閘控，然後通過生成器的原生尺度和總和重新注入它們。這兩者結合了決策時的位元引導和組合時的代碼組合，因此被掩蔽的潛在特徵在代碼運算中被精確保留，同時局部的、尺度感知的編輯被應用於目標區域。在使用Infinity-2B的PIE-Bench上，BitResEdit在相同骨幹的VAR編輯器中達到了最強的文本對齊，將編輯區域的CLIP提升了+1.07，超過了最強的先前編輯器，同時保持背景保護與之競爭。消融實驗顯示，BitEdit和ResEdit在目標對齊和背景保護中扮演互補角色。
2606.13558.author: Shengqiang Zhang et.al.
2606.13558.authors: Shengqiang Zhang, Ruotong Liao, Volker Tresp, Barbara Plank, Hinrich Schütze
